validated_commands.build_notes: Use .dotnet/dotnet (local SDK). Restore first. Unit test project has pre-existing NuGet version mismatch in agent env (2.3.0.0 vs 2.2.1.0) — CI is authoritative.

[Efficiency Improver] perf: skip PropertyBag construction in BFSTestNodeVisitor when filter has no property expressions

backlog.notes: MessageBus and TerminalOutputDevice ConsumeAsync scan done on 2026-05-03: both look clean. PropertyBag operations already optimized.

backlog.title: PropertyBag.GetEnumerator() returns IEnumerator<IProperty> (boxes PropertyBagEnumerator struct). Return struct type directly for zero-alloc duck-typed foreach.
backlog.notes: Would eliminate the last remaining alloc in property filter path. Requires internal API change to PropertyBag.

stale_issues_to_note: 7947, 7974, 7990, 7998 - duplicate open issues from failed PR attempts for LINQ closures. Cannot close programmatically (update_issue limit=1 per run). Consider manual cleanup.

notes.treenodefilter_closures_v2: OperatorExpression.SubExpressions: IReadOnlyCollection->FilterExpression[]. MatchFilterPattern/MatchProperties: switch expressions->switch statements with foreach loops. MatchProperties walks _property linked list directly. _filters.Last()->[Count-1]. Eliminates ~3-5 heap allocs per MatchesFilter call (2026-05-04).
notes.test_build_env_issue: Unit test project has pre-existing NuGet version mismatch (2.2.1.0 vs locally-built 2.3.0.0). CI is authoritative for test results.
notes.hotpath_scan_2026-05-03: MessageBus (AsynchronousMessageBus) and TerminalOutputDevice/TerminalTestReporter reviewed — both look clean. PropertyBag ops already optimized by previous PRs.
notes.sa1503_warning: SA1503: braces must not be omitted — always use braces even for single-statement if bodies in this repo.
